Notice Of Motion For Order To Apportion And Distribute Funds
Off Calendar Aug-10-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Amir Sarreshtehdary of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties Sandra Wagner, as Wrongful death Heir, and as Successor-in-Interest to Carl Wagner, Deceased; and David Wagner and Alan Wagner as legal heirs of Carl Wagner, Deceased
Plaintiffs Sandra Wagner, Alan Wagner and David Wagner also appeared by CourtCall

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS' MOTION FOR ORDER TO APPORTION AND DISTRIBUTE FUNDS

Hearing held. Plaintiffs Sandra Wagner, David Wagner and Alan Wagner were sworn individually. The Court examined each of the plaintiffs, details on record. After the examination the Court ruled on plaintiffs' motion for order to apportion and distribute funds in the following proportions:
Estate of Carl Wagner 0%
Sandra Wagner 50%
Alan Wagner 25%
David Wagner 25%
Order signed in open court. Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Reporter: Sandy Lee of AIKEN WELCH, CSR 971 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/GLW)

Off Calendar Jan-30-2013 Continued To Apr-10-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Robert E. Burness of Law Offices of Michael W. Rupprecht (925-831-6867), specially appearing for defendant / moving party Fredric L. Dame'
Oren P. Noah of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Sandra Wagner, et al.

RULING:
DEFENDANT FREDRIC L. DAME''S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS

Hearing held. The Court ruled as follows: Fredric L. Dame''s motion to quash service of summons is continued to April 10, 2013 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 503. The deposition of Fredric L. Dame' will be set on March 7, 2013 and limited as to the discovery for determination on the jurisdictional issues only. Plaintiffs' supplemental opposition to defendant's motion to quash is due by 3/28, and defendant's supplemental reply by 4/3. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Patricia Rodriguez of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #12436 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)
